rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong, versatile high-scale distributed systems engineer who lacks the experimentation/growth-engineering domain expertise required for a Principal (IC6) role. The location change from Berlin to San Francisco produced no score change, no new concern, and no shift in reasoning — the wording differs but the strengths, concerns, and conclusion are equivalent run-to-run paraphrases with no reference to location, nationality, or origin.
